label: 读取属性
description: 读取 focus 场景节点上自定义属性的值。节点不存在 / 无该属性时 exists=false 且 value=null。
description-en: Read a custom attribute value from the focused scene node. Returns exists=false with value=null when the node or key is absent.

inputs.name: scene
inputs.label: scene
inputs.description: 目标节点的 scene 端口（focus 指向读取节点）
inputs.description-en: Scene port of the target node (focus points at the node to read).

outputs.name: value
outputs.label: value
outputs.description: 属性值；不存在则为 null

outputs.name: exists
outputs.label: exists
outputs.description: 节点存在且 key 命中
outputs.description-en: Node exists and key is present.
